Now I have a clear picture. Let me summarize the differences:

**Current `agents.html` card structure:**
- Uses `<a>` tag as card wrapper (link to agent detail)
- Has `rounded-lg border p-5` with conditional border classes
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + status text, created date
- No `bg-white`, no `shadow-sm`, no `overflow-hidden`
- No toggle switch
- No delete button
- Different padding (`p-5`), different font sizes

**Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card structure:**
- Uses `<div>` wrapper
- Has `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events count), delete button
- Padding `p-5`
- More consistent with modern card design

The agents card needs to be refactored to match the skills/plugins card style. Let me create the plan.

function.name: save_plan
function.arguments:
{"content":"# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same
","filename":"fix-agents-card-styling.md"}

stored_messages.content: {"mode": "plan", "tasks": [], "next_task_id": 1, "plan_file": "plan/fix-agents-card-styling.md"}

Oke, aku udah cek dan nemu bedanya. Ini ringkasan masalahnya:

**Agents card (current):**
- Pake `<a>` tag wrapper
- Pake conditional border (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Nggak ada `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Tampilin: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Nggak ada toggle switch, nggak ada delete button

**Skills/Plugins card (target):**
- Pake `<div>` wrapper
- Class: `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Tampilin: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button

**Yang perlu diubah:**
1. Refactor card template di `agents.html` (line 74-99) — ganti `<a>` jadi `<div>` dengan styling yang sama kayak skills/plugins
2. Tambahin toggle switch enable/disable (pake API yang udah ada)
3. Tambahin delete button (pake `showConfirm` dialog)
4. Update JavaScript functions: `toggleAgent()` dan `deleteAgent()`

Approval dulu ya, baru aku eksekusi? 🚀

args.content:
# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same

args.content:
# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same

- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events count), delete button
- Padding `p-5`
- More consistent with modern card design

The agents card needs to be refactored to match the skills/plugins card style. Let me create the plan.

function.name: save_plan
function.arguments:
{"content":"# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same
","filename":"fix-agents-card-styling.md"}

stored_messages.content: {"mode": "plan", "tasks": [], "next_task_id": 1, "plan_file": "plan/fix-agents-card-styling.md"}

Oke, aku udah cek dan nemu bedanya. Ini ringkasan masalahnya:

**Agents card (current):**
- Pake `<a>` tag wrapper
- Pake conditional border (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Nggak ada `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Tampilin: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Nggak ada toggle switch, nggak ada delete button

**Skills/Plugins card (target):**
- Pake `<div>` wrapper
- Class: `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Tampilin: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button

**Yang perlu diubah:**
1. Refactor card template di `agents.html` (line 74-99) — ganti `<a>` jadi `<div>` dengan styling yang sama kayak skills/plugins
2. Tambahin toggle switch enable/disable (pake API yang udah ada)
3. Tambahin delete button (pake `showConfirm` dialog)
4. Update JavaScript functions: `toggleAgent()` dan `deleteAgent()`

Approval dulu ya, baru aku eksekusi? 🚀

Let me start by exploring the workspace structure.

args.content:
# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same

{"content":"# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same
","filename":"fix-agents-card-styling.md"}

args.content:
# Fix Agents List Card Styling

## Problem
The `/agents` page card styling doesn't match the `skills` and `plugins` list cards.

## Differences Found

### Current `agents.html` card:
- Uses `<a>` tag wrapper (link to detail)
- No `bg-white`, `shadow-sm`, `overflow-hidden`
- Uses conditional border classes (`border-indigo-300`, `border-gray-200`)
- Shows: name + super badge, ID badge, description, status dot + text, created date
- Different padding/font hierarchy

### Current `skills.html` / `plugins.html` card (target style):
- Uses `<div>` wrapper with `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Shows: name + version/author, toggle switch, description, badge (tools/events), delete button
- Clean, consistent card design

## Plan

### Step 1: Update `agents.html` card template (lines 74-99)
Replace the current `<a>`-based card with a `<div>`-based card matching the skills/plugins style:
- Use `bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden`
- Name + super badge in header (clickable link to detail)
- Show agent ID as a subtle badge (like skills show version)
- Description with `line-clamp-2`
- Status indicator as a badge (like skills/plugins show tool/event count)
- Add enable/disable toggle switch (matching skills/plugins toggle style)
- Add delete button (matching skills/plugins delete style)
- Keep the `onclick` for navigation on the name area

### Step 2: Update `agents.html` JavaScript functions
- Add `toggleAgent(agentId, enabled)` function (matching skills/plugins toggle pattern)
- Add `deleteAgent(agentId, name)` function with `showConfirm` dialog
- Update `renderAgents()` to generate the new card HTML

### Step 3: Verify consistency
- Ensure padding, font sizes, colors match skills/plugins
- Ensure responsive grid works the same
